heading: 0.6 Course workflow
text: Plan deploy → download → organize → process → inspect quality → clean standardize → prepare final dataset → document report.

heading: 1.1 Lesson 1.1: What is an accelerometer?
text: accelerometer sensor records acceleration time, commonly along three axes. human movement research, device directly “know” whether person exercising, sitting, asleep. Researchers combine recorded signal documented processing method, wear location, study protocol derive interpretable outcomes.raw signal commonly stored gravitational units (g) metres per second squared (m/s²). Later pipeline, signal can summarized metrics ENMO (Euclidean Norm Minus One), raw-acceleration metric subtracts 1 g remove static effect gravity summarize dynamic movement. Intensity summaries MVPA (moderate--vigorous physical activity) direct sensor readings; derived applying thresholds algorithms processed data.

heading: 1.2 Lesson 1.2: What can accelerometers measure?
text:
Accelerometer recordings can support estimates several dimensions movement behavior. exact outcome depends device, placement, algorithm, calibration, processing choices. Common outcomes include physical-activity volume intensity, sedentary time, body posture, activity type, sleep-wake timing Quante et al., 2015; Arvidsson et al., 2019.
Evidence details: examples potential accelerometer-derived measures.

heading: 1.3 Lesson 1.3: Placement and protocol decisions
text: monitor initialized, study team must choose device model, wear location, start stop dates, instructions participants, criteria evaluating whether recording usable. decisions affect participant burden outcomes can validly interpreted.Different monitor placements useful different questions. thigh-worn monitor may support posture classification, wrist placement often improves comfort continuous wear. best placement follows research question protocol rather universal rule Migueles et al., 2017; Kerr et al., 2017.

chapter: Module 4 Setting Up R and GGIR
heading: 4.2 Lesson 4.2: GGIR's six numbered parts
text: GGIR documentation lists six numbered parts. course, core individual-level pipeline usually relies parts 1–5, part 6 optional used analysis plan needs . Still, refer workflow six numbered parts learners can recognize current GGIR terminology.Terminology update: Teach data_masking_strategy, older shorthand strategy. Teach GGIR() single user-facing function call.

chapter: Module 4 Setting Up R and GGIR
heading: 4.3 Lesson 4.3: Core GGIR parameters
text:
values examples teaching. universal defaults.
GGIR parameters explain processing.
code:
library(GGIR)

GGIR(
  datadir = "03_ggir_input",
  outputdir = "04_ggir_output",
  mode = 1:6,
  do.enmo = TRUE,
  data_masking_strategy = 1,
  hrs.del.start = 0,
  maxdur = 0,
  qwindow = c(0, 24),
  mvpathreshold = c(100, 120),
  timethreshold = 5,
  anglethreshold = 3,
  def.noc.sleep = 1,
  threshold.lig = 30,
  threshold.mod = 100,
  threshold.vig = 400,
  timewindow = c("MM", "WW")
)

chapter: Module 7 Setting Up Final Dataset in Stata
heading: 7.1 Lesson 7.1: Final-dataset workflow
text:
course cleaning workflow can written numbered Stata plan:Import part 5 files: import part5_personsummary_WW_..._T... files preserve original file names.Clean ID variables: standardize participant IDs, remove spaces formatting artifacts, confirm uniqueness.Append lot: append collection lot/batch single person-level dataset keeping batch indicator.Merge person + day files: merge person-level summaries part2_daysummary day-level outputs using approved ID/date structure.Clean sleep records: merge process part4_nightsummary, drop sleep values coded 2–6 following Pelotas/UFPel example rule.Generate MVPA bouts: create 1-minute, 5-minute, 10-minute MVPA bout variables plus 20-minute inactivity indicators GGIR automatically create exact variables needed.Generate n-days variables: count valid days, weekday/weekend days, records meeting ≥10 hours awake wear.Evaluate reliability: apply Spearman-Brown Prophecy method estimate reliability changes number days.Collapse wide weekly means: convert day-level records participant-level weekly averages wide-format variables required analysis.Apply three-parameter exclusions: exclude records fail approved combination valid-day count, awake wear duration, weekend-day requirement.Save dated .dta: save final dataset date stamp export data dictionary/log.示例: Pelotas/UFPel cohort
UFPel -file workflow credited Otavio Leão, Giulia Salaberry, Charles Lucena. Treat strong reproducible example, universal template: study must decide ID cleaning, valid-day rules, bout definitions, exclusion criteria.
